style_prompt: Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in French. No photo realism, no people, no logos.
image_prompt: An editorial hub-and-spoke diagram on warm cream paper, deep navy line work with small rust accents. A central rounded box labelled ENT TOOLS, ENTERPRISE GATEWAY, with a small key icon labelled SSO at its left entrance. A single robot icon labelled AGENT connects to the key from the left. From the gateway, labelled spokes fan out to small boxes: BRAVE SEARCH, ELEVENLABS, CLOUD PROVIDER APIs, OPEN-SOURCE MODELS, PRIVATE COMPUTE, TIME WEATHER NEWS, and SOCIAL MEDIA. Below, a separate dashed-outline cluster labelled COMING SOON holds four small boxes: SHAREPOINT, SERVICENOW, 1GX ERP, MICROSOFT 365. Calm, architectural, legible labels. No logos, no people. All text labels in Canadian French. Match the composition of the source image exactly; only the text labels change.
